header.title: Engineering Hour
header.subtitle: AI-Augmented Developer Series
hero.h2: Use AI like<br class="hidden md:block"> a senior engineer
hero.desc: 15 hands-on sessions on integrating AI tools into your development workflow, from basic setup to agents and advanced automations.
card.p1.title: Setup & Golden Rules
card.p1.desc: IDE vs CLI, context management, guardrails, and the key anti-patterns to avoid.
card.p2.title: AI Memory
card.p2.desc: How AI tools learn about you: memory types, MEMORY.md, and hands-on examples with Claude Code.
card.p3.title: Advanced Planning
card.p3.desc: Prompt structuring, efficient context management, and how to guide the model's reasoning.
card.p4.title: Claude Hooks & Automated Trust
card.p4.desc: PostToolUse, PreToolUse, and how to create automatic validation loops without giving up human judgment.
card.p5.title: Data-Driven Decisions with MCP
card.p5.desc: Model Context Protocol: how to connect Claude to external tools and make decisions with real data.
card.p6.title: Secure Workspace & Guardrails
card.p6.desc: CLAUDE.md, CONSTITUTION.md, and how to create guardrails that protect the project without killing productivity.
card.p7.title: Skills & Slash Commands
card.p7.desc: How to create reusable skills, YAML frontmatter, auto-invocation by Claude, and the index pattern with sub-skills.
card.p8.title: Agents, Sub-Agents & Agent Teams
card.p8.desc: Single agent vs multi-agent, isolated sub-agents, Agent Teams with peer-to-peer, and how to justify token costs.
card.p9.title: The Integrated System
card.p9.desc: Hooks + Memory + Agents + Skills + Plans + MCP working together. Real integration scenarios and advanced recipes.
card.upcoming.title: Coming Soon
card.upcoming.desc: Next session in the series. Content to be defined.
card.p10.title: TDD with AI: Tests as Contract
card.p10.desc: Inverting red-green with AI, a test pipeline integrated with hooks and memory, test-theater anti-patterns, and mocks vs reality.
card.p11.title: Living Memory · Local RAG + Reflect
card.p11.desc: Local hybrid search with QMD, indexable static memory, and automatic lesson capture with reflect. From manual curation to memory that updates itself.
card.p12_15.desc: 4 final sessions in the series. Content to be defined.
footer.brand: Engineering Hour · By Paulo Griiettner
